name: Nokwon Commercials & Industries, Inc.
summary: Nokwon Commercials & Industries, Inc. offers silk screen printing inks. It also offers binders, hardeners, and aluminum pastes; precision stop cylinder presses, industrial stop cylinder presses, sheet-fed cylinder presses, feeder detachable flat beds, and automatic presses; compact multifunction pressure and vacuum forming machines; and heating plate type pressure forming machines; and plastic film-metal sheet composite coil, environmental protection materials, and silicone rubber films. Nokwon Commercials & Industries, Inc. was formerly known as Nokwon C.I., Inc. and changed its name as Nokwon Commercials & Industries, Inc. in February, 2018. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Paju, South Korea.
